text: Dad, you good for Sunday dinner? Come by around 4, Kevin is grilling and the kids want to show you something.
Wouldn't miss it. I will bring the cutting board I finished for Emma's teacher. Need me to pick anything up?
Just yourself. Emma has been asking all week.
Hey dad, you around Saturday? Wanted to swing by the shop and give you a hand with that bench.
Always. Bring your gloves, we will resaw the walnut. Proud of you, kid.
Thanks dad. See you Saturday morning.
Steve, you coming Thursday? I want to show you how to pinch the pierogi properly.
Yes Ma, 4 o'clock like always. I will bring the Herald and your prescriptions.
Good. Drive safe.
Steve! Donnie said you outbid him at poker again. You free for the game Sunday?
Somebody has to keep him honest. Tell Donnie Section 527, kickoff at 1. Bring the chili.
Will do, see you Sunday!
Hey, are we still set for mom's care meeting on the 17th? I can drive.
Yeah, Greenfield at 10. I will cover the quarterly payment, we split it like always.
Sounds good. Thanks for handling the paperwork.
Steve, that table saw fence you mentioned - found a good one online, want me to order it?
If it is the Biesemeyer, yeah. Appreciate you. The knee is better, PT is helping.
Great to hear. Linda and the kids cannot wait for Sunday.
Dad, you around for Sunday dinner on the 6th? Emma wants the maple cutting board you promised.
Already oiled and wrapped. Bringing pierogi too. Tell Emma it's done (Oct 6).
Steelers-Ravens is on Oct 6, Jack's got his jersey on. You heading to 527?
Same two seats since '91. Save me the recliner if I'm late back from the shop Oct 6.
